narrative:
Bloomingburg (precinct in Fayette County) has 421 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.5 percentage points.
